summary: Iteration 12 Testing COMPLETED: All Hero Slide Layer Positioning improvements verified. (1) Frontend homepage layers use absolute positioning with correct left/top percentages calculated from X/Y coordinates. (2) Admin HeroCanvasEditor displays background image on the canvas.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides returns all X/Y coordinate fields (title_x/y, subtitle_x/y, description_x/y, button_x/y, media_x/y)
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides returns background image field
Backend: Coordinate values are within canvas bounds (0-700 for X, 0-300 for Y)
Backend: All slides have valid slide_type field (photo/video)
Backend: Admin endpoint returns all slides with coordinate fields
Frontend: Homepage hero title layer has position: absolute with left=26.8571%, top=28.6667% (calculated from coords 188,86)
Frontend: Homepage hero subtitle layer has position: absolute
Frontend: Homepage hero description layer has position: absolute
Frontend: Homepage hero button layer has position: absolute
Frontend: Admin HeroCanvasEditor displays background image via inline style: url('/api/uploads/812bfd0bffcc43eab9690ebc3903fdd1.jpg')
Frontend: Admin canvas shows all 5 draggable layer blocks (Title, Subtitle, Description, Button, Video/Photo)
Frontend: Admin canvas legend displays current X/Y coordinates for each layer
seed_data_creation: Used existing slides in database for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 features fully tested: (1) HomePage HeroSection uses absolute positioning for all layers (title, subtitle, description, button, media) with left/top percentages calculated as (x/7)% and (y/3)% from the slide's coordinate fields. (2) HeroCanvasEditor accepts backgroundImage prop and renders it as CSS background-image on the canvas container. HeroSlideForm passes form.background to this prop. Existing slides: id=35051426 (Photo, active) with background image, id=7b858a93 (Video, active).

homepage_absolute_positioning.media_layer: position: absolute with calculated percentages (for video/photo slides)

admin_canvas_background.implementation: CSS background-image inline style on canvas container
